import torch
import numpy as np
import os
import sys

# Load MetricGAN+
from speechbrain.inference.enhancement import SpectralMaskEnhancement

print('Loading MetricGAN+ model...')
model = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(
    source='speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank',
    savedir='/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank'
)
model.eval()

print('\n=== Model attributes ===')
for attr in dir(model):
    if not attr.startswith('_'):
        val = getattr(model, attr)
        if not callable(val) or isinstance(val, torch.nn.Module):
            print(f'  {attr}: {type(val).__name__}')

print('\n=== Named modules ===')
for name, mod in model.named_modules():
    if name:
        params = sum(p.numel() for p in mod.parameters())
        print(f'  {name}: {type(mod).__name__} ({params} params)')

print('\n=== Modules dict ===')
if hasattr(model, 'modules'):
    mods = model.modules
    if hasattr(mods, 'keys'):
        for k in mods.keys():
            print(f'  {k}: {type(mods[k])}')
    else:
        print(f'  modules type: {type(mods)}')
        print(f'  modules: {mods}')

print('\n=== hparams ===')
if hasattr(model, 'hparams'):
    hp = model.hparams
    for k in sorted(hp.keys()):
        v = hp[k]
        if not callable(v) and not isinstance(v, torch.nn.Module):
            print(f'  {k}: {v}')

# Try to access generator
print('\n=== Trying to access generator ===')
gen = None
for attr_name in ['generator', 'G', 'enhance_generator']:
    if hasattr(model, attr_name):
        gen = getattr(model, attr_name)
        print(f'  Found generator at model.{attr_name}')
        break

if hasattr(model, 'modules') and hasattr(model.modules, 'generator'):
    gen = model.modules.generator
    print(f'  Found generator at model.modules.generator')

if gen is not None:
    print(f'  Generator type: {type(gen)}')
    print(f'  Generator params: {sum(p.numel() for p in gen.parameters())}')
    print('\n  Generator architecture:')
    print(gen)
    
    # Test forward pass
    print('\n  Testing generator forward pass...')
    # Create dummy magnitude input
    # Based on n_fft=512, freq_bins=257
    # Need to figure out the right input shape
    try:
        dummy_mag = torch.randn(1, 1, 257, 100)  # [B, 1, F, T]
        with torch.no_grad():
            out = gen(dummy_mag)
        print(f'  Input: {dummy_mag.shape} -> Output: {out.shape}')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'  Failed with [B,1,F,T]: {e}')
        try:
            dummy_mag = torch.randn(1, 257, 100)  # [B, F, T]
            with torch.no_grad():
                out = gen(dummy_mag)
            print(f'  Input: {dummy_mag.shape} -> Output: {out.shape}')
        except Exception as e2:
            print(f'  Failed with [B,F,T]: {e2}')
            try:
                dummy_mag = torch.randn(100, 257)  # [T, F]
                with torch.no_grad():
                    out = gen(dummy_mag)
                print(f'  Input: {dummy_mag.shape} -> Output: {out.shape}')
            except Exception as e3:
                print(f'  Failed with [T,F]: {e3}')
else:
    print('  Generator not found via standard attributes')
    # Try to find it by iterating
    for name, mod in model.named_modules():
        if 'generator' in name.lower() or 'gen' in name.lower():
            print(f'  Found module: {name} -> {type(mod)}')

# Also look at the enhance method source
print('\n=== Enhance method ===')
import inspect
if hasattr(model, 'enhance_file'):
    src = inspect.getsource(model.enhance_file)
    print(src[:2000])

if hasattr(model, 'enhance_batch'):
    src = inspect.getsource(model.enhance_batch)
    print(src[:2000])

# Check for forward method
if hasattr(model, 'forward'):
    src = inspect.getsource(model.forward)
    print('\n=== Forward method ===')
    print(src[:2000])
